updateMessage: Incorporates Budget 2026 changes and PRSI increased to 4.2%

incomeTax.name: IT
incomeTax.tooltip: Income Tax paid on taxable income

capitalGainsTax.name: CGT
capitalGainsTax.tooltip: Capital Gains Tax (and Exit Tax) paid on investment gains.

helpText.label: Private Pension
helpText.contributionDescriptionP1:
How much of your age-dependent maximum you want to pay out of your gross salary into a private pension scheme.

If you enter 100% here, you will contribute the maximum allowed for your age as per the tax rules. Do not include employer matching contributions here; there's another place for that.
helpText.contributionDescriptionP2:
How much of your partner's age-dependent maximum they want to pay out of their gross salary into their private pension scheme.

If you enter 100% here, your partner will contribute the maximum allowed for their age. This field is only used in two-person simulation mode.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP1:
Enter your expected weekly state pension amount.

Refer to [this page](https://www.gov.ie/en/publication/b6193-how-to-calculate-your-state-pension-contributory-rate/){state pension,contributory,calculate,contribution} to find how to calculate yours.
helpText.statePensionDescriptionP2:
Enter your partner's expected weekly state pension amount.

Refer to [this page](https://www.gov.ie/en/publication/b6193-how-to-calculate-your-state-pension-contributory-rate/){state pension,contributory,calculate,contribution} to find how to calculate theirs.

investmentTypes.label: Index Funds
investmentTypes.helpText: Irish and EU/EEA-domiciled Index Funds (including ETFs) are subject to Exit Tax at ${investmentType.taxation.exitTax.rate,percentage} with a ${investmentType.taxation.exitTax.deemedDisposalYears}-year deemed disposal rule.

investmentTypes.label: Shares
investmentTypes.helpText: Individual shares and investment trusts are subject to Capital Gains Tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage} on disposal.

investmentTypes.label: RSUs
investmentTypes.helpText: Restricted Stock Units are taxed as employment income (IT/USC/PRSI) at vesting based on market value. Subsequent disposal of vested shares is subject to Capital Gains Tax at ${taxRules.capitalGainsTax.rate,percentage}.
